description_long: This object is a rectangular, dark blue network switch, specifically the NETGEAR ProSafe 24 Port Gigabit Switch. The front face features 24 Ethernet ports arranged in two rows, with each port clearly labeled, and a series of indicator lights for network activity and status. The left side of the front panel displays the NETGEAR logo and product information in white text. The rear side has a power input socket and a small circular vent, while the opposite side features a series of ventilation slits for cooling. The top and sides are smooth and unadorned, giving the device a robust, utilitarian appearance. The overall construction suggests a metal chassis with plastic components for ports and indicator covers.
description: A dark blue NETGEAR ProSafe 24 Port Gigabit Switch with 24 front-facing Ethernet ports, indicator lights, and ventilation slits on the side.
description_view_0: The front view shows the NETGEAR logo, product label, 24 Ethernet ports, and multiple indicator lights.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a circular vent and a few small indicator holes, with no ports visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a power input socket and a small indicator light, with a plain surface otherwise.
description_view_3: The right side view features a series of vertical ventilation slits and a few small indicator holes.
attribute_port_arrangement: 24 Ethernet ports in two rows on the front panel, power input on the rear right
